name: Attention Sweep Enforcer
goal: Add PostToolUse arm hook and PreToolUse gate hook to the Brain's Claude Code session, enforcing full-fleet sweeps before gated worker actions

tasks.name: Create attention-sweep-arm.sh (PostToolUse arm hook)
tasks.description: Write the PostToolUse hook that arms the sweep flag only when get_worker_status(all) returns a valid JSON array response. Fails open if response is not an array (daemon error).

steps.description: Create ~/.claude/ironclaude-hooks/attention-sweep-arm.sh with the complete hook script (see plan markdown for full content)

tasks.name: Create attention-sweep-enforcer.sh (PreToolUse gate hook)
tasks.description: Write the PreToolUse hook that blocks gated worker actions when the sweep flag is missing or older than 3 minutes. Fails closed on TOOL_NAME parse failure. Flag is armed by attention-sweep-arm.sh, not here.

steps.description: Create ~/.claude/ironclaude-hooks/attention-sweep-enforcer.sh with the complete hook script (see plan markdown for full content)

tasks.name: Register both hooks in Brain's settings.json
tasks.description: Add attention-sweep-enforcer.sh as a fourth PreToolUse entry (matcher: '') and attention-sweep-arm.sh as the first PostToolUse entry (matcher: 'mcp__orchestrator__get_worker_status') in ~/.ironclaude/brain/.claude/settings.json

steps.description: Read current settings.json to confirm structure before editing
Write updated settings.json adding PreToolUse entry for attention-sweep-enforcer.sh and PostToolUse entry for attention-sweep-arm.sh (see plan markdown for complete final content)
